segments.text: I definitely think that Game & Watch is coming out, yeah.
I mean, even though Dora Migi beat, like, there was so much stuff that happened to allow Dora Migi to win that set against Miya.

full_text: I definitely think that Game & Watch is coming out, yeah. I mean, even though Dora Migi beat, like, there was so much stuff that happened to allow Dora Migi to win that set against Miya. Like, dude, like.
